description: The Tulane University Deming Pavilion Fitness Center Renovation Package is approximately 14,000 SF of selective interior and exterior demolition (additional storefront being added) of architectural walls, ceilings and finishes along with related MEP systems within the areas noted to be demolished, along with a renovation of that area into a new fitness center with Locker Rooms, Weight Training Area, and support spaces. The project scope area is limited to the interior spaces of the previous ground floor tenant spaces occupied by Walgreens, PJ’s Coffee and Subway, along with a couple of dormitory support spaces that are being considered for renovation into a new fitness center for the downtown campus. All work to be done as per plans.

description: Prep suite for future tenant white box turn over-- Scope or work includes: • 1st Floor: o Complete interior demolition and removal of finishes on 1st floor except restrooms, janitor closet and electrical panels. o Removal of existing ATM and replacement of French doors (already reviewed by VCC Ref # HG784Y). o Prep suite for future tenant white box turn over. o Existing HVAC, electrical and sprinkler system to be modified for reduced layout. • 2nd Floor: o Complete interior demolition and removal of finishes on 2nd floor. o Prep suite for future tenant white box turn over. o Build new ADA restrooms (new ACT ceiling and ADA plumbing fixtures). o Build 2-hour demising wall. o Install new roof access ladder and hatch. o Existing HVAC, electrical and sprinkler system to be modified for reduced layout. • Roof: o Remove portions of existing ductwork. o Install new condensing unit. o Install new roof access hatch.

description: Lower existing first-floor elevation 30 inches as follows: Remove existing interior partitions, interior doors, plumbing fixtures, casework, and first-floor structure. Remove existing exterior openings and steps. Install new concrete slab on grade for new floor slab. Install new interior partitions, and new plumbing fixtures, and extend existing wall finishes down to new lower floor elevation. Install new exterior openings. Interior spaces will be "white box" spaces for future retail spaces that will be done at a later phase. Included in the work are miscellaneous repair and restoration work to the exterior. All work will be done per drawings attached.

description: Renovation of an existing 3-story masonry commercial building with 2224sf with a 188sf mezzanine. First floor build-out for a new restaurant. Work to include all new mechanical, electrical, and plumbing service, kitchen hood and exhaust, new finishes and modifications of the storefront. Provide a new enclosed stair from first floor to second floor. Join new stair enclosure with the existing stair flight to the third floor. Add new mechanical stair from the third floor to the roof for access to new rooftop mechanical equipment servicing new ground floor restaurant. Second and third floors are to remain vacant and will require separate permit(s) to build out. All work to be done as per plans.

description: New construction of at 3-story, 104,715sf apartment building. BW Cooper Senior is an affordable housing apartment building for seniors (all independent living). There are 103 one-bedroom apartments plus amenities including a community room, equipped laundry rooms, mail room, private fenced courtyard with walking paths and seating, bike parking, and EV charging stations. There is an existing building on site that was the original affordable housing and we are preserving, renovating, and making it the new leasing office. All work to be done as per plans.
